star_1.text: Arguably worse than the second game. While there is a noticeable lack of stuff blocking the screen, unlike in the first game, good GOD this is the most laggy game I think I have ever played. And the ad problem just gets worse. I didn't even click on the ad, and it opened the ad and completely closed out the game. Also, the actual gameplay difference between this game and the first? Miniscule. Ik the game is just to beat him up, but the first weapons are literally the same.

Too many forced ads. It is so bad I'm sure they use it as a tool to annoy us into paying them to just stop. Honestly. I don't even know if I like the game yet. I haven't gotten past the ads. Reply. You did not do your best to limit those ads. Come on. Seriously? Mid play, ad. End level, ad. Free item, 10 ads. If you could program an ad to breathe. You would.

Way too many ads. You can't even start up the game without getting an ad. Then you open the menu and get another ad. After choosing a weapon, after every KO you get an ad. The game gives you 30 seconds of playtime between 30-60 seconds of ads. This game went from a fun anger management game to an unplayable cash grab. The old game was much better when the purchases are more hidden and optional, instead of being thrown in your face twice a minute. It's such a shame.

Ad overload and complete lie. Not at all what is presented in any ad. You are bombarded by ads even after playing it just once for less than a minute. The shear amount of ads thrown at you within just the first five minutes of playing this "game" (and I'm seriously finding it difficult to consider even calling this a game and not just an interactive ad revenue generator) is more than enough to throw this fake "game" in the proverbial trash can. Avoid this garbage.

Too many ads. If I'm interested in going Premium, I will--I don't need an ad for it every three kills. I don't need an ad every time I change a weapon. At the end of each kill, an ad is offered to gain an extra award and even though the ad and "X" buttons are clearly marked, if you press ANYWHERE on the screen other than the "X," you get the long ad, and if you press the "X" you get a short ad. Not cool. I prefer to have more gameplay than ads. Thank you, no.

This has got to be one of the wildest cash grabs I've downloaded. Instant ad. Didn't get to even try the game. Just instant ad. Removing ads is $15... Wild, I might have done $5 but $15? No. That's not all folks, blood is sold separately. That's right, you can choose to add the blood in the game for the low low cost of $4.99! Like I said, crazy cash grab, I didn't give them a dime and I still want a refund. I didn't even tell you about their ridiculous subscription service. Just don't.

It's decent other than the fact it's the exact same game with a new walk-through. It's like revamping a ratchet and clank game. It' very new or original, I can't even call this a sequel. EDIT: IT STINKS. IT' BAD. DONT PLAY IT Never in my life have I been so infuriated because of a videogame. They removed the grand prix. I had a total of 100 spins saved up. I updated, assuming they'd ADD something. But no, instead,they got rid of the slot machine and grand prix elements. You have fallen off.

I got ads before I even was able to pull out a weapon, literally within 10 seconds of starting the game. I know they advertise an ad free purchase, but I want to actually try the game before committing money to it. It's ridiculous that they shove ads down my throat so fast that I immediately lost interest in playing.

the game is absolutely as*, I love it when I was kid because it was just fun, simple, and entertaining. But nowadays every button leads you to an ad. I played this game and the ads are longer than the gameplay. Don't play this. I would even give this 0 star if it's possible on how bad it is.

Why did they add so many forced ads? I loved the game until they added the KO thing. They did it to ALL of them. You can skip the ad present, but they intentionally hide the X in the corner and make it not appear for a while. Forced ads in the menu. Near forced ads for PLAYING THE GAME FOR 4 SECONDS. I just can't.
like the others said way too many ads to the point where it is barely playable. this is a game not an ad simulator. please fix it.I want to play this game. not watch ads please.

Fake reviews and WAY TOO many ads. You can't do anything before an ad launches. The developer may say well we need them to make the game free blah blah blah, no you don't. Look at Digital Extremes and Warframe. Their game is FREE and they don't have ads. Do NOT download this waste of time ad player to your device. It's not worth it.

Very disappointed in this app. Do not waste your time. The ads and pop ups make the game trash. Before the devs say anything about it being the income to grow. I paid for the no ads and the amount of things that pop up on my screen trying to get me to pay more is a joke. The game could be fun and I would have been happy to have given you some money. This is ridiculous! Huge waste of $15

Less than 10 minutes, more than 10 adverts and/or pop-ups. Not worth your phone's storage space, let alone your time. Also, weapons need to be "downloaded" individually (clearly to make it as obnoxious as possible to play offline) Please don't waste your time playing this. Hell, I wouldn't even advise wasting your time downloading it.
very bad game the ad shown after every 2 minutes it can be better without ad . the ad irritating 🤬🤬🤬 the player

way to many forced ads and the response from developers saying they did their best to "limit" is alot of BS. you cant touch anything with an add popping up. press settings add pops up, exit settings add pops up. paid for ad free and next day its all adds again. try to "restore purchase" doesn't happen

it's full of ads which needs money and I don't wanna spend a game where I got bored in 2 hours maybe 3 if I'm THAT bored😴 worse game ever it's will be fine if there no ads. it's also distract me say continue with play button ▶️ with gift 🎁 image like I want it to gone the tiny blue button x like good do it in the store in Ur game is like trash 🗑️ I gotta uninstall it it's full of good rates but never over 1000 even with million communities. a game is for to play not to get sponsor and put li

Every review that isn't probably a bot says the same thing. Listen Ads in mobile games is whatever we can live with it, but being forced into multiple Ads before I can even interact with the actual game is insane. It's probably the worst/ad intrusive mobile game I've ever seen.

same problem as the first one, too many ads, miss the old ktb, I under stand you need adds but too many and you loose players only making them watch like 7 before they leave, but if you have fewer I would play longer rather than uninstall I'm saying (less ads=longer playtime=more total ads=more money) we don't want (too many ads=uninstall+1 star= less total ads= less money) cmon be smart 1/4 game 4/5 ads

Honestly it sucks. The ads after the rewards close ur game so you don't even get the rewards and if you want no ads it's not 5-10 dollars like any othe mobile game, no it's 30 dollars. I'm sorry but yall got to be insane, and it's practically identical to the other one

star_2.text: Wayyy too many ads. You get 5-10 seconds of gameplay, then 30 seconds of a combination of ads, ui pop ups, and other irrelevant things that stop the flow of gameplay. Want a certain weapon? Watch 10 ads. Want to play for more than 5 seconds? Ad. Then the game crashes for no reason and I have to wait for it to restart. If there was a 100% ad-free, microtransaction-free version, it would be enjoyable. But this isn't that. It's an android app.

Quite literally, you watch more ads than you even get to play... You can't even turn the wi-fi off to avoid them either even though the game technically doesn't require wifi. Not to mention, 3/4 of the weapons were either locked behind a paywall, or weren't even available, and the (free) weapons either needed a ridiculous amount of coins, or just really bland.

this game used to be good, a lot of weapons, slightly annoying but bearable amount of ads, more free items, now this game is missing half its content, has a lot of ads, many good items are behind a paywall, useless features, and the ads are mostly about kick the buddy too, all I wanted to do was hang buddy but now this game makes me want to do it to myself
also to many ads. don't give me the add help us run the game get rid of them I know the real reason you have buy options and the ads are to many to frequent

they've committed a unforgivable sin why can't my buddy eat pea soup and I hate to download my weapons for someone who doesn't have wifi and has the service of a 90s telephone this gets really annoying the gameplay doesn't have to be so crowded I don't care about battle pass i don't care premium also I hate the pop in that pauses the game just to give me coins and ads like I want to spend time with buddy not get interrupted by stuff after I ko him overall I downloaded for nostalgia im disappoint
the game is overall alright, however I do find it really annoying because of how often ads show up. like anytime I beat the subject up, there is an ad every time.

how many times do I have to decline an ad? stare at the same ad for an extended amount of time until you can skip again? open literally anything and you get an ad. get a present afterwards and you have to watch an ad to get the prize with a potential "no thanks" that isn't always there forcing you into yet another ad? yes. finally after all those ads and you are able to play you open anything only to get hit by an ad. i also forgot i had this game and I don't appreciate the fake ads for this ga
Fun game but there's ads after knocking out the buddy regardless if you choose to accept the free gift or not. would not recommend unless you want 3/4 of your total game play to be viewing ads.

A 12 second level, then 30 seconds of ads. If a developer can't even manage a 1:1 ratio of gameplay to ads, the game isn't playable. I'm certainly not going to bother paying for a game that lazy- there are dozens of good games out there that structure ads in a reasonable, non-greedy way, and still provide a good experience. This is not one of them.

You can't really call this a sequel it's more of a "remaster". No new weapons (70% you can't even use), Buddy has little to no health, and I'm pretty sure theres even more ads than the old game. Pretty ok remaster but not a good sequel. You at least fixed the crashing issue which I can give an extra star for.

Talk about an unneeded sequel. Playgendary has really dragged this game through the mud, and the obvious reason is for money. Ads playing every two minutes, a ridiculous $6 a WEEK subscription to remove ads and constant offers popping up. I remember this game being good, and it saddens me to see it fall so low.

It's fun and goofball game after all, the fluke that annoys me is that every second, an AD will show up, Everytime I open shop, after buddy is done, and everytime I first fire any weapon in action. This is just weird, If you turn off the Wifi, It turns into a boring offline game with no joy. So, that's all I guess?

This game could be fun but like most mobile games the devs want to prioritize making money over providing a decent game. There's almost no weapons/items you can use without being a subscriber to *one of two* memberships. One of them is a recurring weekly $8.00 charge and the other is a set price one time payment (that still doesn't give you access to everything.) Basically have fun whipping bouncy balls at the guy until he dies and you automatically get an ad

Sadly, greed is the driving force with this game. A simple, easy game. If you can play it. I was 30 seconds into the game and barely at that when our game could not progress unless several subscription combos and tools,toys, and a contract signed to agree to keep positive the play rules or be expelled from daily play up to 45 days for the first offense.

Just terrible, there are way too many ads, I can't even play peacefully without my phone being overpowered by all the ads. I enjoyed Kick the Buddy when there were fewer ads and less of bugs, this is just a money farm and you are draining people of their money. Would never install this again. I give this a 2 star, I like the designs/weapons/ect. But dude, the ads and pay for rewards thing man, it's too much, this is supposed to be a kid's game, you think people want to pay to play?

It's fun and gameplay is exactly as expected. There are way too many ads, though... I get needing to make money with free games, but omg a level takes like 15-30 seconds then there is immediately a 30sec-1min ad after each level... Airplane mode worked for a bit, but I keep getting pop-ups that the internet isn't connected and $5/week for no ads is kinda ridiculous...

First Of all this game is amazing! It's an amazing time killer. But it's not like that intresting shown in the ads. And the ads just make it painfully hard to play without ads and the diamond membership doesn't even kill the ads you click(not forced or pop ups) which is annoying because most of the time I misclick when I ko buddy and get to the reward. In the recent update it's optional in the past updates it's was annoying as hell. The game just need to focus on no ads and updates. Thank You..!

Kick the Buddy Second kick is a fun game where you can use different weapons and tools to play with a character and relieve stress. The game looks better than the older versions and has nice animations But on some phones it sometimes gets slow or freezes especially when the internet is on. Also you need internet to play the game so you can not really play it offline If you have a good phone and good internet, this game is enjoyable. But if your phone is not very strong it might not work well

I have never seen a game with, so many ads. Jesus Christ, how many do you need? Every time, I kill the buddy, even when I don't accept the present, there is still an advert, and there's adverts when you go onto the battle pass. Also this game says it's offline but clearly not, if you go offline with no no WiFi it says, you need to be connected to the internet, total scam. So you have to buy the no ads just to go offline, honestly Sheesh. Yeah gets 2 stars for me.

Too many ads and dies too fast. You tap him like 10 times and you get a 'reward' which is just an ad grab. I had to watch 5 ads back to back to unlock an item and it was my only option outside of paying real money for it. When I got it it lasted for 30 seconds before he died again and I got another reward which was just watching more ads.

star_3.text: Its a great game, but most of the content requires internet. Its a single player game why should it require Wifi? I'm playing Google Play on PC every time i try to buy a new item it says "Internet connection needed to download content" i'm literally connected to the wifi? Like what is this, also somehow i'm still getting ads even when it says i'm not connected to the internet, not that i have a problem with the ads i have the patience of a saint, anyways that's all.
this game has to many ads and is boring:/

Game was really boring at times especially when trying to grind up to get another item, felt super dull when you realise half the items are locked unless you buy them with gold. Didn't really feel like a sandbox game, just felt like another boring cash grab. However while the game was pretty boring, dull, and annoying at times. I did find the game pretty goofy and funny. Being able to throw around the "Buddy" with his sub-par dialogue was pretty funny.

The amount of ads are crazy. Every time you kill the buddy, it offers you a reward. If you press the X, an ad pops up anyways and you dont get the reward. I just want to be able to kill the buddy and releave stress. nobody can do that with an add every 20 seconds! Id recommend buying no ads, but if you dont want to, i wouldnt recommend playing honestly.

Fun, but ads completely ruin the experience. Equip an item, get an ad. Click the big blue X button when it offers you a gift for an ad and you still get an ad even if you click no! Sure you can pay to get rid of them but its £5. Its also very slow trying to K.O. the buddy, No matter what weapon you use it will take a solid minute/minute thirty to knock him out.

Good game for passing the time, it's advised to keep your wifi off as it is a constant barage of ads in every place they can put one. Guns aren't really satisfying to use. It'd be better if they had a model in-game and if there were Particle Effects so you can see a hit, and maybe a neat touch of dust. It feels unpolished but it can be better. If the guns were improved I reckon it would outweigh the constant ads. 3/5

Pretty good game just one thing too many ads. Even when i don't push the item or rewards. This game has too many ads it's like 60 percent ads. I would have given it a five star review if it didn't have all these ads. I know you can buy a version with no ads but it would be nice if there was a free version with no ads. This game in recap there are too many ads. I remember when there were fewer ads. That's what I think about kick the buddy.

Overall, the game is not bad, but there are like a million things that ruin it. First of all, the ads. there was like 4 ads after i joined the game and 2 after I shot buddy ONCE. It is really irritating and pathetic for a "stress relief" game. Secondly, you cannot have the weapons at the end of a category until and unless you got the ones before (even if you have a bunch of cash) I liked the original but even that is ruined by ads. I promise to play the game all day if you improve these features

I really like the game but you guys have too many ads on here. When I pay for something in the store an ad pops up after I finish downloading a weapon. Or they'll just pop up out of nowhere so I'll turn off my Wi-Fi just to play the game more. I'm not trying to throw you guys down or anything I was just saying can you guys take it easy on the ads I like the game I just don't like the ads. 😀😃😄😁

Kick The Buddy was my CHILDHOOD!!! I loved playing this when I was growing up. When I decided to download it after a while. I couldn't use any new weapons so I downloaded this. This works a little more except I just waste cash or gold when I purchase it. Also, sometimes when I try opening 2x the rewards, opening presents, or trying getting the gold that you can get every 5 minutes, it almost ALWAYS says that there is no ads available, I have one of the best Wi-Fi's in my country but this STILL happens.

This is great! Is not too much ads like in the un-remastered version! A better feel to the game! (4/16/2022) The game feels more high quality then I expected. I not saying this is highy recommended, but everyone haves opinions I guess. 5/5 Edit (6/17/2022): Buddy dies so fast, ads appear every 40 seconds(It still pops up with a ad blocker).

It has so many ads 1) When I buy a new item which is ALL the time afterwards it sends me to a add. Then I slowed down on buying stuff and there where still was bunch of ads. 2) When I equip the new item it sends me to a ad.(some of the ads can be long or very short.) Yes, I know that some games contain ads but this is crazy I am getting ads EVERY sec. Now other than that the game is well it's not lagging or glitchy so that's good but I hope the ad thing gets better.

This game was a really nice one I used to play it with my brother a lot but now the game is still fun but the problem every one (including me) is talking about is the ads there are too many ads in my opinion they should remove the ads or give us less adds it's seriously too many ads! So I will have to give it a three star I only recommend it if you like watching ads.

Crazy potential, but there are issues. Not even issues, just one I would like to see tweaked. I understand this is a free game, and the majority of revenue made from this game comes from advertising. However I think it's a little ridiculous that a game from an established developer should have ads every 2 minutes. I understand airplane mode works to circumvent this issue, but that didn't come to my mind as I lost interest in playing within my first ten minutes because of the ads. Great game tho.

I downloaded this game, because I heard about it during my childhood, and I played the original before. I really like the old design and yes I agree it has a lot of ads, but I don't mind, but this, and the original game for some reason with me, after each ad, if I want a gift, a weapon, or something, it kicks me out, not allowing me to play the game and my phone says it has a bug or something- idk what this is about, but other than that, I think the game is good

I like the game but I have a few problems. The biggest problem is that you can't get half the things until you use certain items, which means you have to use the items that you already have and then you can start using all the other items and the original game. It felt like you could torture buddy imwhatever way you wanted but here you feel limited. Second of all Buddy dies too fast Buddy used to feel tough but now it goes down about a few hits so I don't really like this game.

Better than the old one but I deleted it bc of an issues with the ads that I'm pretty sure others have also dealt with. I'll go to watch an ad for a reward and it will say none are available but right after it will give me an ad. It sounds more like the app is money hungry and doesn't want to let others get the wanted rewards from them. Don't plan on playing until this is fixed.

It's a good game, but please can you do it so that when something's going on (e.g. mega bomb) and I enter the bank or the diamond membership, it keeps playing. Because I find it annoying when it pauses it and I'm in the diamond membership or bank. So please fix it, oh and the font is wrong in the notepad. And please add an option to turn off that present that pops up everytime buddy dies.

Tooo much ads...its insane the amount of ads...right after buddy dies, there is an ad, u wanna change ur weapon, ad...everywhere I turn, there is an ad...plays good but the buddy says some really questionable stuff at times...graphics are ok...just, if u wanna play this, I recommend u turn ur Internet off and restart ur device, then play it....then u may have some amount of fun...some games I play has literally only one ad per hour or none but u can choose to watch one...but this, ur bombarded.

Great game but I like it offline but it has some problems like when I load and I've done loading a weapon when I'm online but when I go to be offline I can't use it and need to load again and kinda too much ads but still fun great game too. And why some items are not available please make all the coming soon items to be available and make some to get the items gold and cash please

star_4.text: good game but why did they remove a lot of stuff bring them back if they were here it would be a 5 star :(
The ads kept interrupting the game.

I like the game and sure there are a lot of ads but I don't like to rate things because of ads one problem I do have is that buddy dies too easily (I can't believe I'm saying that) but yeah he dies way too quickly I bounced him on the walls for a few minutes then what I put down some building blocks and he just flips into them he immediately died I'm not even joking another problem I have is that not everything is unlocked on the get-go so that's also a bit annoying but overall a nice reboot.
Nice, but it keeps saying that I have no internet access to Download Content when I'm online actually. Can you fix this sort of bug please? I'll be forever grateful if you do so. Thanks! :)

Great game. When you feel irritated or stressed you can just play this game and calm down. It's pretty fun and there are different ways to kill the buddy. The only reason I gave this 4 stars and not 5, is because I think there could have been some more variety in things you can do. For example, there could be minigames where you can obtain gold bars or bucks. Overall, loving the game!

amazing game! buddy is hilarious and so sarcastic! whenever you choose a new way to kill him in the shop, he'll say something like "oh, great! use that every time!..." although, there is no unequipt button. so you can't just beat him up with your hands again unless you leave the game, delete the tab and come back. other than that, pretty decent!

I love the kick the buddy I used to play it a lot when I was a kid on my Sony phone. it's really great and fun to play! but there a lot of ads,can the developers reduce the amount of ads if possible? overall I really like the game and the sequel, I played buddy 1,2 and buddy forever. they are really good and fun but please reduce the amount of add if possible.

Kick the Buddy: Second Kick is an enjoyable game with great animations, creative weapons, and a lot of humor. The gameplay is entertaining and provides plenty of fun for players. However, there are some frustrating issues. After about 50 minutes of play, the game crashes, and I can’t get back in. Also, even with an internet connection, I’m unable to watch ads to claim rewards, as it always says no ads are available. Fixing these issues would make this a 5-star game. For now, I rate it 4 stars."

Great game, just one problem. The trash can and the bookmark thing keep on glitching out, stopping me from using them until I exit the app and then re open it, which is really annoying, especially when they glitch out again after like 5 seconds. When the bookmark glitches out, it still opens the inventory thing when I click it, the inventory just goes invis till I close it by clicking somewhere else.

So much fun one of the best games I've ever played the only reason why I'm giving it four stars instead of five it's because it has way too many ads every time that you kill him it has an ad what she gets killed like way too fast but other than that a very very fun game and I love how you have to buy blood so if children want to play the game they'll have to talk to their parents first I love this game I cannot say this enough like I absolutely love it.

Great game, really needed a remaster too for higher quality and cheaper prices. It might be easier to get bucks too? But the reason I'm not rating 5 stars is because there are so many ads. Almost everytime you beat up buddy, you get an ad. It gets ridiculous, but you can buy no ads for 5 dollars. Other than ads, pretty fun game!

This game was a great remaster, New UI, Classic remakes, but I have three bugs to report. When trying to restore your item purchases on the game it dosent restore it. Only purchase like diamond subscription. Two, when it tells you, you can get an item/currency if you watch an ad if you were holding something before that popped up it sends you into the ad registering your tap and hold as a click on the button, in some cases you CANNOT skip the ad. Three, Diamond Membership says no ads, but lies.

its a great game, but the thing is too much adds. adds for presents, ads for gold, 20 adds for one thing, adds for no reason. the only way to get gold is by watching a ad. but other than that its a great game. its a nice game for strech. do recommend if you take the internet out.

This game is very well designed than the part 1 of this game. If you turn on the Wi-Fi you can easily get the weapons for beat the buddy. But they are giving playable adds if we try to play it we will go to play it is normal only but the game is coming from the first looding.... This is the only disadvantage in this game I will rate this game only 4 stars because of this disadvantage.

Easy quick to load to the game Decently better then the first on would recommend it in stead of the first one because in the first one it would always take ages to load and then if u where out of signal after all that long waiting for it to load so you can play the game it will say no signal so I definitely would recommend this one just a better experience the hole way through

I understand that you need adds but a forced adds every 2 times I kill buddy. REDICULOUSLY ANNOYING. Even if I decline gift, you guessed it... an add. Please remove that ANNOYING feature. Tho the ability to customise buddy is amazing and many other thing everything but forced adds is good in this game. Your whole game is literally a game of adds.

I really like this game, I just wish they added those giant blue dart's back to the game, now when I try to get into the sports and office section, it says " under construction" and it's been like that for years now, and maybe all the people that say TO MANY ADS or UNINSTALLING RIGHT NOW are just dumb because I don't get many ads. 🇭🇲

Its really a good game to take your anger out or just to have fun but there is way to many ads. There is a ad remover but some people don't have about 4 dollars to give away. Some people have food to put on the table. Other than the thousands of ads that pop up every 5 seconds the game is good. I recommend if you have patience.

This is pretty good. The problem is the ads. I know have to purchase premium, but I can't afford it at the time. If we can't purchase premium, why can't we have about 30 minutes before another ad pops up? I'd give this 5 stars if we could have 30 minutes before an ad interrupts.

Pretty fun, but it does come at a cost though. It has a bunch of ads like the old one but the developers chilled down on them so its pretty limited. Its still a great game though. I'd prefer this one over the original if you want better gameplay mechanics. 4/5☆

star_5.text: In my opinion this is better than the first one by far. 1 the reality of this game is unreal. 2 the game has so much new weapons to destroy Buddy with. 3 overall one of the best games I've played. But there is some issues. For some odd reason I think they pull up an ad way much. For example when I go to click on a weapon a ad shows up. Then after I beat buddy with the weapon or switch it there will be another AD. But overall a very good game.

It's just like the old version without all those ads. I'd like to see more from the old versions of the game, like when you'd first unlock the game, buddy would appear and say "KICKIN' IT GOOD!" Along with the slot machine. I'd also like to see new weapons, like a quicksand pit where you could throw him in and drown him, a skunk that sprays him until he faints, and a carnival water shooting game where you could shoot water into his mouth until he bursts like a water balloon. That's my ideas.

I was looking for a good way to feel like a Nazi soldier during the Holocaust and explore my need to torture something that can't fight back. Hearing the screams and help me as I burn, saw, and destroy something cute, brings a Dexter ish thrill. Its so simple that I can allow my kids the joy of torture, gas chamber, and electric chair fun. Who wouldn't enjoy the sick twisted pleasure of being able to bring it back just to submit it to more and more torture. Now we need a Renee good skin.

Super fun, I really recommend the game because it is entertaining and I've only played for like 10 minutes! I love the game A LOT and I will play it everyday in the future...But I do have one small problem that I'm sure anyone else would agree with, ads. Ads come up quite a lot during the time I'm playing (10 minutes) they are a bit annoying but I still enjoy the game as it is. Please reduce the amount of ads, thanks.
Brutal... But still very fun! But there's one small problem... I think you need to reduce the amount of gems and coins but that's all! I really do enjoy this game I think it's a five star! (:

An amazing sequel to the initial game, overall a large aresnal and many things to choose from. If you enjoyed the original kick the buddy (or the lower-rates reboot) then this game is a must! On the other hand there are a crowd of ads ready to destroy you in a metaphorical manor. Every 5 seconds there will be an ad saying "want free gold" it seems as if the ads will not stop coming and as much as I love the game this really ruins the experience.

I was made to get the 6.49 premium just to play I love spending money and the ads just make the game so much better I just love playing games that give me so many ads even when you win you don't get your reward unless you watch a 30 second ad it's basically extra entertainment. Please make the ads longer and more often its the only way I can enjoy the game

More fun our kick the buddy second kick than kick the buddy...This game is most speciality and make more fun is kill the crazy and naughty doll with punch and drop out killing style..I love this technique...

It's really fun, there's a variety of weapons that are just outstanding, I didn't just rate this for the reward, I generally wanted to rate it, it's really good as I like games with like I said, a variety of different things or items, where you can just do whatever you want, kick the buddy is so fun, to everyone out there, I recommend playing it, especially the remastered version!!!

This game is great! Although I liked the original version better but it kept freezing and as soon as I opened the app again, my progress was gone, the weapons, the gold, the money, all that. It happened when I was using the buzzsaw weapon in the game as a grinding method, I wish they patched that but overall it's a great game, i wish buddy lived longer though but yeah both games are great
I love kill the buddy it's an amazing game if we have a challenge it will be better if we can't do that can you just make the ads a little bit please
please create a thing that you can search for weapons that would be really efficient and easy to access to weapons it would really help the community alot.

This game is pretty cool but it feels like there are less weapons than in the original. Can you add the mini game option and maybe a new weapon like, an object in the horror section called the "jumpscare" which makes the box dark for a few seconds, and while the box is dark you hear buddy scream, than when the box is bright again, buddy is just a pile of bones.

Better than the original one. Can you add multi-player so that we can fight each other with our weapons or defeat the buddy together. Also can you add other modes with new weapons. The weapons are a bit expensive so can you make it a bit more cheaper so that it'll be more fun. Other than that this is the best game I've ever seen in my whole life. Thank you guys so much for the hard work in making all of these fun games and I hope that you can make more. Love ya'll. THANK YOU SO SO MUCH..........

Love the game, love the new gui, love everything! But one problem, the ads. I can't stand them! They are not constantly popping up but just popping up with no warning, when ever you don't want the present after knocking out buddy, it still makes you watch an ad! I give 5 starts because you guys have come a long way, I prefer the legacy version if you want more nostalgia. But if you wanna better gui I prefer this. Keep up the good work!

Once you purchase everything, the game is really.. REALLY fun!! After me doing it, it is great. But, the weapons have been locked due to construction. You guys could have kept the old sprites since the game was just as good with more weapons, bit I get that it takes a long time. So I wish you and your team the best on working on em.

I LOVE IT!!! buying no ads, (which I did) is very cheap, and so is buying the blood. (also bought) it's so fun to hear iphis funny voice and what he says. for the teeth event, the nunchucks are amazing. there's so many options to choose from for your weapon, etc. it's sooo funny! I can't stop grinding. I even got first place in the teeth event, and I hope that in 6 hours when it's over, I'll still be in 1st! I LOVEEE this game and I totally recommend it.the graphics are really funny and amazing!

Kick the Buddy: Second Kick is my favorite game! Following the events on the first game, Buddyman or "Buddy" for short is back but crazier then ever! To get yourself chill out, have fun with your friend buddy by using weapons on him, using cold weapons, explosives, silly weapons, and more! Not only you can customize your character, but can customize the background as well! There's also the Pass which is awesome! I love this game, and it will always be my favorite!

Love it! So many ways to destroy the buddy. If you haven't played it yet, try it out. Also, remastered is so much better than the normal kick the buddy. So, if you play the original kick the buddy, switch to this one. Another thing is that the weapon prices are lower than the normal one. So just try it and your gonna love it.

It's a great game it makes a lot of sense, like you kill a doll and thats fun because you can use many different weapons and you know with my imagination I like to use various weapons like the pistol with the axe and it's very effective which i like but anyway I just wrote this just so I could rate it and you know developers love ratings, so anyway thank you for making this game, and keep up the good work. :D
